OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The MIME types of files the connector can process.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enable or disable auto-import of files.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_CREATE_REPORTS.description: Create a report for each MISP event.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_REPORT_TYPE.description: The report type to use for MISP events.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_CREATE_OBJECT_OBSERVABL.description: Create text observables for MISP objects.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_CREATE_TAGS_AS_LABELS.description: Create tags as labels (sanitize MISP tags to OpenCTI labels).

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_GUESS_THREATS_FROM_TAGS.description: Try to guess threats (threat actor, intrusion set, malware, etc.) from MISP tags when present in OpenCTI.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_AUTHOR_FROM_TAGS.description: Map creator:XX=YY tags to use YY as the author of the event.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_IMPORT_TO_IDS_NO_SCORE.description: Score to use for indicator/observable when attribute to_ids is false.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_IMPORT_UNSUPPORTED_OBSE.description: Import unsupported observables as x_opencti_text with just the value.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_IMPORT_WITH_ATTACHMENTS.description: Try to import a PDF file from the attachment attribute.
